name: Bass with Avocado Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a blender; cover and process until smooth. Set mixture aside.
2. In a shallow dish, combine lemon juice and next three ingredients.
3. Dip fillets in lemon juice mixture, then dredge in bread crumbs.
4. Place fillets on a baking sheet coated with cooking spray.
5. Bake at 450°F for 7 minutes; turn fillets over and bake an additional 7 minutes or until fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
6. Transfer fillets to a serving platter, and top with avocado sauce.
Alternate Fish: Jumbo Cod, Orange Roughy, Grouper.
Per Serving: Calories: 193, Protein: 23.6 g, Carbohydrate: 10 g, Fat: 6 g, Cholesterol: 63 mg, Sodium: 332 mg.
